reviewer_safe_baseline: RAN-dominant · feasibility-aware · resource-sustainability-aware · transport-informed · runtime-active SLA scoring
allowed_claims: RAN-dominant hybrid SLA admission with PRB hard gates (n=450 NASP-hard+).
Transport-informed scoring with P2 slice-specific w_transport (0.05/0.03/0.02).
Runtime tri-slice score differentiation under same network_state_id (score_mode, n=44 triplets).
Conceptual alignment with 3GPP TS 28.541, ETSI ZSM, O-RAN (references_4.bib).
partially_supported_claims: Slice-specific SLA admission: score/policy proven; same-state admission labels limited (7/150; 0 score_mode-only).
Transport domain: informed term active, not multidomain-dominant.
Core domain: observability present; does not drive admission.
Slice lifecycle governance: pipeline exists; full tri-slice lifecycle not validated.
forbidden_claims: Robust tri-slice admission divergence without path stratification.
